steps.title: Clarify what “emphasize duration” requires
steps.content: The goal is to stress how long Rhinebeck and Larreynaga have been sister cities. The notes give a start date of 1989. Emphasizing duration means the sentence must communicate that the relationship has been ongoing from 1989 to the present, not just that it began then or that sister-city relationships in general have a long history.

steps.title: Test each choice against the duration requirement
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Since the end of World War II, sister cities such as Rhinebeck, New York, and Larreynaga, Nicaragua, have continued to form social partnership to promote each other's cultures.': This emphasizes the duration of the sister-city concept in general, using WWII as the reference point, not the duration of Rhinebeck and Larreynaga's specific relationship. ✗
  • Choice B — 'As sister cities, Rhinebeck, New York, and Larreynaga, Nicaragua, have engaged in cultural exchange and partnership since 1989.': “Since 1989” with present-perfect “have engaged” establishes that this specific pair's relationship has lasted from 1989 to now — directly emphasizing duration. ✓
  • Choice C — 'Larreynaga, which in 1989 became a sister city—or “twin town”—to Rhinebeck, New York, is located in Nicaragua.': Mentions 1989 as a start date but shifts focus to Larreynaga's location, not the ongoing duration of the partnership. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Despite their distance from each other, the sister cities of Rhinebeck, New York, and Larreynaga, Nicaragua have enjoyed the same partnership as many other sister cities.': Focuses on geographic distance and a comparison to other sister cities; gives no timeframe that conveys duration. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
